final_answer:
There is a contradiction in your request. You instructed that the phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly once, but also that it must appear exactly twice. These instructions are mutually exclusive and cannot both be fulfilled in a single email draft.

Please clarify which frequency you would prefer (once or twice), and I will be happy to revise the email accordingly.<|im_end|>
